# ingit

> ingit is a fast, animated, local-first Git GUI for Linux and macOS. It visualizes commit history, predicts Git operations before they finish, and reconciles the graph against real Git results.

## Canonical resources

- Website: https://ingit.pages.dev/
- Source code: https://github.com/capaj/ingit
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ingit/cli
- Installation: `npm install --global @ingit/cli`

## Core features

- Animated and virtualized commit graph
- Optimistic checkout, merge, rebase, cherry-pick, revert, uncommit, and branch moves
- Time Machine reflog UI for recovering lost commits and deleted branches
- Working-tree staging and diff inspection
- GitHub pull requests and live CI status on commits
- Claude Code and Codex session detection and focus handoff
- Plain Git underneath, with no database or daemon

ingit is open source under the MIT license.
